title: Modification of contracts
doc_html:
SUBPART E. CONTRACT MODIFICATIONS

AND TERMINATION

§1627. Modification of contracts

            The office of state procurement may adopt and promulgate rules and regulations permitting or requiring the insertion in contracts for the procurement of professional, personal, consulting, and social services appropriate clauses to enable the state to effect desired changes and modifications to such contracts.

            Added by Acts 1979, No. 715, §1, eff. July 1, 1980; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
SUBPART E.  CONTRACT MODIFICATIONS
AND TERMINATION
§1627.  Modification of contracts
The office of state procurement may adopt and promulgate rules and regulations
permitting or requiring the insertion in contracts for the procurement of professional,
personal, consulting, and social services appropriate clauses to enable the state to effect
desired changes and modifications to such contracts.
Added by Acts 1979, No. 715, §1, eff. July 1, 1980; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan.
1, 2015.
